context: Checks whether the final artifact follows the telemetry-essentials instructions from the published Elixir Phoenix Skills plugin.

checklist.name: instruction-1
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Use this skill before writing ANY telemetry, logging, or metrics code.

checklist.name: instruction-2
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Use structured logging (`Logger.info("action", key: value)`)** — never string interpolation in log messages

checklist.name: instruction-3
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Use `Ecto.Repo` telemetry events for query monitoring** — Ecto already emits events; don't manually instrument queries

checklist.name: instruction-4
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Use `Phoenix.LiveDashboard` in dev/staging** — free observability with zero code

checklist.name: instruction-5
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Never log at `:debug` level in production** — it includes query parameters and PII; use `:info` level instead
